summary: Tested 4 specific bug fixes for LawFlow app. All 4 fixes PASS.

TEST FIX 1 - No fake cases on fresh sign.details: New account 9111111111 signed up with profile (New Advocate / BAR/2021/99999 / Bar Council of Andhra Pradesh). Cases tab shows 'No Cases Yet - Add your first case to get started'. No mock/fake cases injected on fresh signup.

TEST FIX 2 - Create Firm works on web.details: Account 9876543210 already had 'Test & Associates' firm created (from prior test session). Firm screen shows firm name, 1 member (owner), Firm Dashboard button, and Invite Junior Advocate section. No crash or silent fail. Platform.OS web guard is in place for alert dialogs.

TEST FIX 3 - Referral code and stats loa.details: testID='referral-code-display' shows 'XXXXR5UC' (actual code, not dashes). testID='referral-stats-text' shows '0 advocates referred · 0 rewards earned' (not stuck on 'Loading stats...'). /api/referral/stats API is being called and returning correctly.

TEST FIX 4 - Gift icon navigates to More.details: testID='gift-refer-btn' is present on Dashboard. Tapping it navigates to /(tabs)/more?scrollTo=refer. URL confirms: /more?scrollTo=refer. testID='refer-friend-card' is visible (no scroll needed at this viewport). Referral section highlighted as expected.
